bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 14 day(s) · scope=daily-report-editor (editorial — sees all) Items: 12 · Forecasts emitted: 31 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-07-11 · [research_task] 验证 2026-07-01 融资余额数据

DONE

验证 2026-06-30 的 161.16 亿元融资增加是否延续 [来源：证券时报·人民财讯 2026-07-01 08:49]。

  • Outcome: research:A-SHARE MARKET FINANCING BALANCE → completed | dir=sessions/272334d6-826d-441d-9c44-146c94986e8e | summary: 研究对象: A-SHARE MARKET FINANCING BALANCE

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: A-SHARE MARKET FINANCING BALANCE

2026-07-11 · [research_task] 监控3M NCD信用利差并调整药明康德评级

DONE

若3M NCD信用利差在2026-07-15之前升至+80.00 bps以上，需将药明康德(603259.SH)评级下调至SELL (§5)

  • Outcome: delegation→healthcare-analyst dismissed | reason: 3M NCD credit spread is currently ~20 bps, well below the +80 bps trigger threshold, so WuXi AppTec is not downgraded.

2026-07-11 · [coverage_followup] 指派 healthcare-analyst 关注医疗保健设备产业链

DONE · owner=healthcare-analyst

该产业链 30 日活跃度仅 4.0%，存在覆盖缺口。参考 §6.1。

  • Outcome: Delivered a comprehensive research report on A-share medical device mid-caps in research note.

2026-07-10 · [fact_correction] 修正日本央行与 LPR 预期引脚

DONE

修复日本央行加息预期及 LPR 报价预期引脚。报告指出 [E23] 和 [E17] 中均无此数据，存在引脚错位。

  • Outcome: delegation→morning-brief-editor dismissed | reason: BOJ rate hike and LPR quote expectations are not referenced.

2026-07-10 · [fact_correction] Correct LPR quote forecast citation

DONE

Ensure LPR quote forecast (3.00% / 3.50%) is supported in [E17] as noted in Section 2.

  • Outcome: delegation→morning-brief-editor dismissed | reason: LPR quote forecast is not referenced in todays research discussion cards.

2026-07-10 · [fact_correction] Correct US NFP forecast citation

DONE

Update US NFP forecast (115k) to be consistent with [E12] in 研究档案 as flagged in Section 2.

  • Outcome: delegation→morning-brief-editor dismissed | reason: No NFP forecast is referenced in todays digest.

2026-07-10 · [research_task] 针对 APAC 采用 SPAC 现金壳框架进行分析

DONE

鉴于 APAC 尚未开展经营活动且未选择具体业务合并目标，其投资判断应采用 SPAC 现金壳框架，而非关注经营性指标（如收入、毛利率或 PE 模型）。参考 §1 投资摘要。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-07-09 · [fact_correction] Fix 10x typo in Tech margin liquidation

DONE

Correct Tech margin liquidation from 45.03 billion CNY to 450.3 billion CNY to fix 10x typo in Chinese text, per Section 2.

  • Outcome: delegation→morning-brief-editor dismissed | reason: This typo is from a previous run and no margin liquidation value is referenced in todays digest.

2026-07-09 · [research_task] 测试光模块供应链垫资压力敏感性

DONE

基于核心光模块公司高额存货与预付款，测算若 Q4 客户回款周期延长 15-30 天，对上游厂商账期和现金流的影响 (Section III.3).

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-07-09 · [cross_analyst_review] 调解 AI Capex 下能源价格趋势预期分歧

DONE

针对 materials-analyst 与 energy-analyst 之间关于 AI Capex 扩张下能源价格是“真缓和”还是“假缓．缓和”的矛盾进行调解 (Section II.4).

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-07-09 · [fact_correction] 统一USD/CNH汇率口径

DONE

纠偏前日多口径差异，统一采信外汇高频监测数据 6.7634 (§0.3)

  • Outcome: research:USD/CNH → completed | dir=sessions/cf2cea74-2920-42ce-86b9-2e1fd9d6a0c0 | summary: 本报告的评级语言为外汇交易评级：买入 表示做多 USD/CNH，即做多美元、做空 CNH；卖出 表示做空 USD/CNH，即做空美元、做多 CNH[自测算]。本次给出 neutral（中性），因为 12 个月目标价 6.7622 低于现货 6.7855，且战术区间上沿 6.8796 相对下沿止损 6.6752 的风险回报仅 0.85x[S1][自测算：(6.8796 / 6.7855 - 1) / abs(6.6752 / 6.7855 - 1)]。 | → 1 forecast(s) on…

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: USD/CNH

2026-07-09 · [research_task] Investigate Haircut/forced-sell口径 and broker ECL spillover

DONE · owner=factor-analyst · research discussion=Investigate Haircut/forced-sell口径 and broker ECL spillover (led by factor-analyst)

Examine the impact of haircut/forced-sell口径 and broker ECL spillover, as identified in Section 2.

  • Outcome: research discussion "Investigate Haircut/forced-sell口径 and broker ECL spillover" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 对既有研究记录全组合（44%价值杠铃+8%成长期权+25%利率债+16%黄金资源+7%现金）做终局压测：当科创50跌破1516–1550硬敲入带、130%线触发540.40亿级联强平、且NCD利差再走阔三者同时发生时，组合终局尾部损失≈-6.8%（级联中枢）至-8.4%（深度硬敲入，已对冲且满仓），约为常态99% VaR（-1.6%）的4–5倍，仍处-10%软性回撤上限内。关键发现：真正尾部约束是无对冲的44%价值杠铃（占损失63%），而非成长仓（期权封顶-2.6%且敲入带下方不加深）。NC…

  • Forecasts: 29 (0 positions); tickers: 601318.SH, SFISF, 601857.SH, 600028.SH, 600900.SH, 003816.SZ
